children.heading: Grants
children.label: a Grants
children.text: To carry out , there are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary $7,500,000 for each of fiscal years 2005 through 2009, of which not more than 5 percent of the funds made available for a fiscal year may be used by the Secretary for administrative costs.section 7783 of this title

children.heading: Agreements
children.label: b Agreements
children.text: To carry out , there are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary $7,500,000 for each of fiscal years 2005 through 2009, of which not more than 5 percent of the funds made available for a fiscal year may be used by the Secretary for administrative costs of Federal agencies.section 7784 of this title
